Name: TRIKE_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol wanted help gathering berries.
NestClueText: The nest is covered in crushed berries. Kevin was last seen near Trikes.

Name: STEGO_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol convinced Kevin that Stegosaurus spikes are fashionable.Kevin has gone looking for style advice.
NestClueText: The sand around the nest is covered in strange drawings of plates and spikes.Large herbivore tracks lead inland.Kevin was last seen near Stegos.

Name: RAPTOR_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol told Kevin that Raptors were hosting a whispering contest, and now he has gone to judge it.
NestClueText: The nest is surrounded by tiny claw marks and dramatic scribbles. Something fast dashed off through the grass. Kevin was last seen near Raptors.

Name: DODO_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol convinced Kevin that Dodos can predict the weather by flapping in circles, and he ran off to investigate.
NestClueText: Loose feathers are scattered all around the nest, and the dirt is stamped with frantic little footprints. Kevin was last seen near Dodos.

Name: ANKYLO_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol told Kevin that Ankylosaurus tails make excellent parade drums, and now he is marching along behind them.
NestClueText: The ground near the nest is covered in neat circular dents, like someone practiced drumming in the mud. Heavy tracks head toward the rocks. Kevin was last seen near Ankylos.

Name: PTERA_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol signed Kevin up for airborne snack delivery, and he has gone chasing Pteranodons.
NestClueText: The nest is littered with dropped leaves and long drag marks from something taking off in a hurry. Kevin was last seen near Pteranodons.

Name: PHIOMIA_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol promised Kevin a grand jungle concert starring Phiomias, and he hurried off before the first toot.
NestClueText: The nest is splashed with mud and there are broad round footprints pressed deep into the ground. Kevin was last seen near Phiomias.

Name: BRONTO_01
BroadcastText: Kevin is in trouble! The Platypussey Patrol told Kevin that Brontosaurus necks are nature's best lookout towers, and he has gone climbing after a better view.
NestClueText: Broken branches and gigantic footprints surround the nest. Whatever passed by here was unbelievably tall. Kevin was last seen near Brontos.
